comment: Synthetic metastatic CRC 2L, 60M, ECOG 1, left-sided sigmoid primary, RAS-mutant (KRAS G12D), BRAF-WT, MSS. Disease progression on 1L FOLFOX+bev after 8 cycles (PR → PD at ~6 mo) with rapid CEA doubling. Engine routes ALGO-CRC-METASTATIC-2L step 1 (no MSI-H) → step 2 (no BRAF) → step 3 (no KRAS-G12C) → step 4 (no HER2 amp) → step 5 (RAS-mut, no rechallenge) → step 6: RF-CRC-TRANSFORMATION-PROGRESSION fires (cea_doubling_4_8wk=true) → IND-CRC-METASTATIC-2L-FOLFIRI-BEV (FOLFIRI continuation of bevacizumab, ML18147 / TML / E3200). Standard cytotoxic-switch + biologic-continuation track post-FOLFOX failure.

prior_lines.outcome: PD at 6 mo with rising CEA
